item.name: Natron Puffer
item.description:
A wavekin which keeps to the deeper portions of Loch Seld.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The sacks their kin use for storing poison are adapted by this creature to instead accumulate carbonate minerals from the deposits found on the beds of salt lakes. Gyr Abanians dry this fish to make a dehydrating agent used for interring their dead.
